title: symptoms.v1
description: Normalised symptom event published to forge.symptoms.v1 by symptom emitters.

symptom_id.description: Globally unique ID for this symptom event.

fingerprint.description: Canonical dedup key: '<dim>:<val>' pairs joined by '|', alphabetically sorted. E.g. 'error_class:ECONNREFUSED|port:8094|service:workflow-registry|signal:probe-failed'.

signal.description: The class of signal that produced this symptom.

service.description: Name of the platform or app service affected.

severity.description: Severity level assessed by the emitter.

emitter.description: The emitter service that produced this event.

tenant_id.description: Optional tenant scope. Absent for platform-wide symptoms.

error_class.description: Optional error class used as a fingerprint dimension (e.g. 'ECONNREFUSED', 'OOMKilled').

port.description: Optional port relevant to the symptom.

route.description: Optional HTTP route relevant to the symptom.

evidence_excerpt.description: Sanitised, fenced excerpt of the raw signal (ANSI-stripped, <> escaped, max 1 KB).

evidence_ref.description: URI pointing to the full evidence payload (Loki query URL, S3 key, etc.).

observed_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the signal was first observed by the emitter.
